case_title: RODRIGO M BERBEL ITO VS. YINNA LI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,125.00 FILED BY BERBEL ITO, RODRIGO M AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YINNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERBEL ITO, RODRIGO M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, YINNA $1,125.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERBEL ITO, RODRIGO M AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YINNA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT LI, YINNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-27-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YINNA
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM:JEAN MILEFF-
